hypothesis: Residualizing each model’s embeddings against simple compositional statistics (bag-of-atoms element counts and total atom count) will eliminate the observed increase in out-of-distribution (OMol25) alignment and cause OOD CKNNA and IDCor to fall below their in-distribution (OMat24/sAlex) values, indicating that the apparent OOD convergence is primarily driven by shared trivial composition/size features rather than a universal representation of matter.
